## Meeting Purpose

[Weekly sync between SchoolAI and GrowthX to discuss programmatic SEO strategy and content updates.](https://fathom.video/share/HHe8JDJ2dp6HRXrr8ksTBPmh25gxeY3X?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Programmatic SEO strategy will focus on creating content for high-quality SchoolAI spaces, starting with broader grade levels before getting more granular](https://fathom.video/share/HHe8JDJ2dp6HRXrr8ksTBPmh25gxeY3X?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)
  - [Team will verify which spaces will continue to exist in SchoolAI 2.0 before prioritizing content creation](https://fathom.video/share/HHe8JDJ2dp6HRXrr8ksTBPmh25gxeY3X?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)
  - [Recent meta description updates completed; team will monitor impact before expanding further](https://fathom.video/share/HHe8JDJ2dp6HRXrr8ksTBPmh25gxeY3X?tab=summary&timestamp=1742.0)
  - [Review process for programmatic content to be determined, balancing efficiency with quality control](https://fathom.video/share/HHe8JDJ2dp6HRXrr8ksTBPmh25gxeY3X?tab=summary&timestamp=1644.0)

## Topics

### AI Note-Taking Tools Discussion

  - [Nikki now using Granola, which offers live transcription, summarization, and querying capabilities](https://fathom.video/share/HHe8JDJ2dp6HRXrr8ksTBPmh25gxeY3X?tab=summary&timestamp=29.0)
  - [Granola integrates seamlessly with meetings, detecting when to start/stop recording](https://fathom.video/share/HHe8JDJ2dp6HRXrr8ksTBPmh25gxeY3X?tab=summary&timestamp=157.0)
  - [Team compared features with other tools like Fathom](https://fathom.video/share/HHe8JDJ2dp6HRXrr8ksTBPmh25gxeY3X?tab=summary&timestamp=65.0)

### Programmatic SEO Strategy

  - [Initial focus on creating content for high-quality SchoolAI spaces (e.g., SchoolAI Sidekick)](https://fathom.video/share/HHe8JDJ2dp6HRXrr8ksTBPmh25gxeY3X?tab=summary&timestamp=352.0)
  - [Content structure: subject (e.g., AI learning assistant) + grade level + teacher benefit](https://fathom.video/share/HHe8JDJ2dp6HRXrr8ksTBPmh25gxeY3X?tab=summary&timestamp=404.0)
  - [Plan to start with broader grade levels (elementary, middle, high school) before getting more specific](https://fathom.video/share/HHe8JDJ2dp6HRXrr8ksTBPmh25gxeY3X?tab=summary&timestamp=470.0)
  - [Aim to create \~300 articles per space, published gradually (e.g., 2 posts per day)](https://fathom.video/share/HHe8JDJ2dp6HRXrr8ksTBPmh25gxeY3X?tab=summary&timestamp=508.0)
  - [Content to live on the blog, potentially rethinking blog structure to accommodate increased volume](https://fathom.video/share/HHe8JDJ2dp6HRXrr8ksTBPmh25gxeY3X?tab=summary&timestamp=600.0)

### SchoolAI 2.0 Updates

  - [Nikki to verify which spaces (e.g., SchoolAI Sidekick, Bell Ringer) will continue to exist in 2.0 version](https://fathom.video/share/HHe8JDJ2dp6HRXrr8ksTBPmh25gxeY3X?tab=summary&timestamp=1289.0)
  - [Some features/tools may be integrated into spaces rather than existing separately](https://fathom.video/share/HHe8JDJ2dp6HRXrr8ksTBPmh25gxeY3X?tab=summary&timestamp=1405.0)
  - [Team needs to update content artifacts to reflect any changes in terminology or feature names](https://fathom.video/share/HHe8JDJ2dp6HRXrr8ksTBPmh25gxeY3X?tab=summary&timestamp=1467.0)

### Content Review Process

  - [Engineering team close to finalizing internal workflows for generating high-volume content](https://fathom.video/share/HHe8JDJ2dp6HRXrr8ksTBPmh25gxeY3X?tab=summary&timestamp=1578.0)
  - [Nikki to review initial batch of articles to determine efficient review process](https://fathom.video/share/HHe8JDJ2dp6HRXrr8ksTBPmh25gxeY3X?tab=summary&timestamp=1644.0)
  - [Considering having Graham review one article per space/benefit to streamline process](https://fathom.video/share/HHe8JDJ2dp6HRXrr8ksTBPmh25gxeY3X?tab=summary&timestamp=1644.0)

### Meta Description Updates

  - [20 previously identified meta descriptions have been updated](https://fathom.video/share/HHe8JDJ2dp6HRXrr8ksTBPmh25gxeY3X?tab=summary&timestamp=1742.0)
  - [Team to monitor impact before expanding to more articles](https://fathom.video/share/HHe8JDJ2dp6HRXrr8ksTBPmh25gxeY3X?tab=summary&timestamp=1832.0)
  - [Considering title changes in addition to meta descriptions for improved performance](https://fathom.video/share/HHe8JDJ2dp6HRXrr8ksTBPmh25gxeY3X?tab=summary&timestamp=1813.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Nikki to provide export of columns for indexing high-quality spaces](https://fathom.video/share/HHe8JDJ2dp6HRXrr8ksTBPmh25gxeY3X?tab=summary&timestamp=288.0)
  - [Nikki to verify which spaces will continue to exist in SchoolAI 2.0](https://fathom.video/share/HHe8JDJ2dp6HRXrr8ksTBPmh25gxeY3X?tab=summary&timestamp=1289.0)
  - [Megan to work with engineering team on finalizing content generation workflows](https://fathom.video/share/HHe8JDJ2dp6HRXrr8ksTBPmh25gxeY3X?tab=summary&timestamp=1578.0)
  - [Team to monitor impact of recent meta description updates](https://fathom.video/share/HHe8JDJ2dp6HRXrr8ksTBPmh25gxeY3X?tab=summary&timestamp=1832.0)
  - [Jenn to consider title changes for improved performance](https://fathom.video/share/HHe8JDJ2dp6HRXrr8ksTBPmh25gxeY3X?tab=summary&timestamp=1813.0)
  - [Nikki to review initial batch of programmatic content to determine review process](https://fathom.video/share/HHe8JDJ2dp6HRXrr8ksTBPmh25gxeY3X?tab=summary&timestamp=1644.0)
